courseTitle: Advanced AI, Simulation, and Procedural Systems
title: Ecosystem Simulation Game
genericDescription: Design interacting populations or resources; tune feedback loops; turn simulation into player decision.
specificDescription: Build a playable ecosystem, economy, infection, weather, traffic, or social simulation. The player must be able to intervene and observe systemic consequences.
gradingRubric: 30 pts simulation model; 20 pts player agency; 20 pts emergent behavior; 15 pts visualization; 15 pts reflection.
